productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Beige Mobile Pouch
description: Style NoteUnderstated and compact, yet spacious, this Linos Perros mobile pouch works the military aesthetic with its rugged cool. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece as a sling bag and wear it across your shoulder or simply carry your essentials, using it as a basic pouch.Product DetailsPolyester blend upper Appliqued brand patch on the frontA zippered compartment in the front with a slap to secure it (that has Velcro closure)A zippered pocket on the flapOne main compartmentHas a fabric adjustable and removable shoulder strapA tab at the back (so you can slide this over you belt)Material and CareBlended polyesterWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 15 cmWidth: 12 cmDepth: 5 cm
